3170090.name: Squab Soundtrack
3170090.description:
Immerse yourself in the captivating and relaxing soundtrack of lofi, made exclusively for Squab by Liniker Nascimento, with great care and love.

For this soundtrack, Liniker used references from genres ranging from Hip-Hop to Synthwave, and at the same time brought a chiptune music aesthetic, which even with more organic tones, recalls the nostalgic sound of retro consoles, such as the Sega Genesis Mega Drive.
